data.content: Je poursuis: je vais restaurer le texte propre depuis la transcription de la conversation (copie intacte du fichier joint), puis je réapplique les UUID correctement pour livrer un SQL propre et exécutable.

toolRequests.name: run_in_terminal
toolRequests.arguments: {"command":"$p = \"c:\\Users\\tarek\\AppData\\Roaming\\Code\\User\\workspaceStorage\\627333e7ec719c42d6678435a67f9dad\\GitHub.copilot-chat\\transcripts\\39357e90-6ba0-481c-a3c2-13fad805e076.jsonl\"; node -e \"const fs=require('fs');const lines=fs.readFileSync(process.argv[1],'utf8').trim().split(/\\r?\\n/);let found=[];for(const ln of lines){try{const o=JSON.parse(ln);const s=JSON.stringify(o);if(s.includes('lessons_all_chapters.sql')&&s.includes('FICHIER SQL COMPLET')) found.push(o);}catch{}}; console.log('matches',found.length); if(found.length){const t=JSON.stringify(found[found.length-1],null,2); fs.writeFileSync('tmp_transcript_match.json',t); console.log('saved tmp_transcript_match.json');}\" \"$p\"","explanation":"Extract attached SQL content from transcript backup to restore file encoding safely","goal":"recover clean file content","mode":"sync","timeout":120000}
